iot.jobtemplate.exponentialrolloutrate.C: Allows you to create an exponential rate of rollout for a job.

iot.jobtemplate.exponentialrolloutrate.B.Description: The minimum number of things that will be notified of a pending job, per minute at the start of job rollout. This parameter allows you to define the initial rate of rollout.

iot.jobtemplate.exponentialrolloutrate.I.Description: The exponential factor to increase the rate of rollout for a job.   AWS IoT Core supports up to one digit after the decimal (for example, 1.5, but not 1.55).

iot.jobtemplate.exponentialrolloutrate.R.Description: The criteria to initiate the increase in rate of rollout for a job.
